programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and perspective to the world's events.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

programme.title: Father Of The Bride Part II
programme.desc: Steve Martin returns in this hilarious sequel to the comedy smash Father Of The Bride. Having married off his cherished daughter, George Banks is ready to get footloose and fancy-free – until his daughter and his wife both announce they're pregnant.

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite
programme.desc: This hilarious cult classic features a host of unforgettable characters, including Kip, Pedro, Uncle Rico and Napoleon himself, the unlikely hero with a red 'fro and sweet dance moves.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Anaconda is an action-packed thriller starring JENNIFER LOPEZ (The Wedding Planner), rap superstar ICE CUBE (XXX: State of the Union), Academy Award®-winner JON VOIGHT (1978 Best Actor, Coming Home) and ERIC STOLTZ (Almost Famous). A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale (Stoltz) and director Terri Flores (Lopez), ventures into the world's most isolated jungle - the Amazon - in search of a lost and forgotten civilization. Early in their journey, they come to the aid of Paul Serone, a Paraguayan guide (Voight), who joins their expedition. But Serone is actually a poacher on the trail of a legendary snake. When Serone hijacks the boat and its crew on his quest to track and kill the giant snake, he steers the expedition right into the path of the deadly monster. Ger ready for a wild, scare-a-minute thrill ride because ANACONDA will grab you and take your breath away.

programme.desc: A culinary legend provides a frustrated office worker with a new recipe for life in Julie & Julia, the true stories of how Julia Child's (Meryl Streep) life and cookbook inspired fledgling writer Julie Powell (Amy Adams) to whip up 524 recipes in 365 days and introduce a new generation to the magic of French cooking. Stanley Tucci (The Devil Wears Prada) co-stars in director Nora Ephron's delicious comedy about joy, obsession and butter. Bon appétit!

programme.title: Employee of the Month (2006)
programme.desc: For years Zack Bradley (Dane Cook) has been working hard at hardly working at the local Super Club. That's until a hottie named Amy (Jessica Simpson) becomes the new cashier. After discovering she's willing to date the next guy to become "Employee of the Month", Zack takes on current titleholder (Dax Shepard) in a super-smackdown to see who will win the honor--and Amy's heart-- in this outrageous comedy that proves you can't succeed at life and love till you get your shift together.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Optimistic and cheerful TV producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Abby and Trace seem finally ready to move forward.

programme.title: The Motherhood
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. With support from The Motherhood, Tasha rediscovers her confidence as a woman.

programme.title: Summer in the City
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A midwestern girl tries to adopt a big city personality with disastrous results.

programme.title: My Gal Sunday
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A newlywed couple must prove their crime-solving prowess.

programme.title: Lead with Your Heart
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Two teens hatch a plot to make their parents realize they still love each other.

programme.title: The Plot to Kill My Mother
programme.desc: A woman who unknowingly grew up under federal witness protection starts to question everything after her mother's murder. She decides to leave the program and find her mom's killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Revenge for My Mother
programme.desc: Audrey teaches postnatal fitness to a group of moms who bring their baby strollers to the park, but when her recently hired assistant secretly starts exacting revenge, Audrey's perfect world erupts into madness.

programme.title: Sister Wife Murder
programme.desc: Chloe attends church for the first time and becomes enamored with her pastor, Caleb. She falls in love with him, only to discover that he is married to two women and that she is entering a toxic and dangerous relationship.

programme.title: Saving My Baby
programme.desc: After she's run off the road, an expectant mother barely survives a harrowing crash. When she awakens days later, she discovers that her baby has been taken.
A young British soldier (Jack O'Connell) must find his way back to safety after his unit accidentally abandons him during a riot in the streets of Belfast.

programme.title: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: Staff Sgt. William James (Jeremy Renner), Sgt. J.T. Sanborn (Anthony Mackie) and Specialist Owen Eldridge (Brian Geraghty) are members of a bomb-disposal unit in Baghdad. As their tour of duty enters its final weeks, the men face a set of increasingly hazardous situations, any of which could end their lives in an explosive instant.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Involuntarily discharged from the Army, a special forces sergeant lands a contract with a private underground military force. When his very first assignment goes awry, the elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: As ‘The Chosen One', Murphy's on a madcap mission to save The Golden Child, a youth with mystical powers who's been abducted by an evil cult.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Come join The Addams Family for the most hilarious scarefest of this season or any other! When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: The family's future grows bleak when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: Tintin and his friends discover directions to a sunken ship commanded by Capt. Haddock's ancestor and go off on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Two years after he and his Autobot friends saved the Earth from the Decepticons, Sam Witwicky (Shia LaBeouf) faces a new battle: college. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the Autobots are working with a secret military organization and trying to make a home for themselves on Earth. When an ancient Decepticon known as The Fallen rises up to wreak vengeance, Sam and his girlfriend, Mikaela, must figure out the history of the Transformers on Earth and find a way to defeat The Fallen once and for all.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sam Witwicky (Shia LaBeouf) and his new girlfriend, Carly (Rosie Huntington-Whiteley), join the fray when the evil Decepticons renew their longstanding war against the Autobots. Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) believes that resurrecting ancient Transformer Sentinel Prime (Leonard Nimoy), once the leader of the Autobots, may lead to victory. That decision, however, has devastating consequences the war appears to tip in favor of the Decepticons, leading to a climactic battle in Chicago.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: Vietnam veteran and drifter John J. Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) wanders into a small Washington town in search of an old friend, but is met with intolerance and brutality by the local sheriff, Will Teasle (Brian Dennehy). When Teasle and his deputies restrain and shave Rambo, he flashes back to his time as a prisoner of war and unleashes his fury on the officers. He narrowly escapes the manhunt, but it will take his former commander (Richard Crenna) to save the hunters from the hunted.

programme.title: Burlesque
programme.desc: Ali (Christina Aguilera), a small-town gal with a great voice, leaves a troubled life behind and follows her dreams to Los Angeles. She lands a job as a cocktail waitress at the Burlesque Lounge, a once-majestic theater that houses an inspired musical revue led by Tess (Cher), the proprietor. Ali vows to perform there and, with the help of a savvy stage manager and a gender-bending host, she makes the leap from bar to stage, helping restore the club's former glory.

programme.title: Roxanne
programme.desc: In this modern take on Edmond Rostand's classic play "Cyrano de Bergerac," C. D. Bales (Steve Martin) is the witty, intelligent and brave fire chief of a small Pacific Northwest town who, due to the size of his enormous nose, declines to pursue the girl of his dreams, lovely Roxanne Kowalski (Daryl Hannah). Instead, when his shy underling Chris McConnell (Rick Rossovich) becomes smitten with Roxanne, Bales feeds the handsome young man the words of love to win her heart.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: An uptight cop (Samuel L. Jackson), the self-appointed watchdog of his neighborhood, strongly disapproves of the interracial newlyweds (Patrick Wilson, Kerry Washington) who just moved in next door. He becomes increasingly hostile toward the innocent pair, going to great lengths to force them out of their home. The situation changes when the young couple decide to fight back.

programme.title: No Mercy
programme.desc: After his partner is killed by the merciless crime boss Losado (Jeroen Krabbé), Chicago cop Eddie Jillette (Richard Gere) takes to New Orleans to settle the score. When he finds Losado's mistress, Michel (Kim Basinger), Eddie handcuffs himself to the girl and heads for the bayou in an effort to draw out his rival. And though squatting in a swamp handcuffed to another person is no recipe for romance, Eddie and Michel soon find themselves falling in love even as Losado is closing in.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: Adaptation of the Pierre Bouelle novel about POWs in Burma forced to build a bridge to aid the war effort of their Japanese captors. British and American officers plot to blow up the structure, but the commander of the bridge's construction has different plans.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes to Washington
programme.desc: When the idealistic young Jefferson Smith (James Stewart) winds up appointed to the United States Senate, he gains the mentorship of Senator Joseph Paine (Claude Rains). However, Paine isn't as noble as his reputation would indicate, and he becomes involved in a scheme to discredit Smith, who wants to build a boys' campsite where a more lucrative project could go. Determined to stand up against Paine and his corrupt peers, Smith takes his case to the Senate floor.

programme.title: Girls Can Play
programme.desc: A detective investigates the murder of a player on a professional girl's softball team.

programme.title: Clue
programme.desc: Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes. Featuring all three surprise endings!!

programme.title: Mother
programme.desc: A neurotic, twice divorced sci-fi writer moves back in with his mom to solve his personal problems.

programme.title: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: Steve Martin plays Reverend Jonas Nightengale, a slick-asoil flimflam man who'll trade salvation for a donation to his touring ministry. Jonas knows how to work a crowd and a con, but his works of wonder are done with mirrors and smoke.

programme.title: Shes Having a Baby
programme.desc: Last year at this time, Jake and Kristi were two crazy single kids in love. Now they're two crazy married adults in transition.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: An ex-con takes a job truck driving across the country. However, the truck is filled with illegal weapons and now he must fight to save his family. The stakes are high as gun runners, government agents and a fleet of monstrous 18-wheelers pursue him in an intense highway duel.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: During an FBI raid on a Moscow nightclub, the brother of Russian gangster Terek Murad (David Hayman) is killed. Murad wants revenge and hires anonymous hit man the Jackal (Bruce Willis) to kill FBI Deputy Director Carter Preston (Sidney Poitier). With the help of Russian agent Valentina Koslova (Diane Venora), Preston finds the only man who knows what the notorious Jackal looks like, imprisoned IRA terrorist Declan Mulqueen (Richard Gere), and forces him to help hunt down the hit man.

programme.title: The Truth About Charlie
programme.desc: Regina (Thandie Newton) meets charming Joshua (Mark Wahlberg) while vacationing in Martinique, as she contemplates ending her whirlwind marriage to enigmatic Charlie (Stephen Dillane). Then upon her return to Paris, she finds that both her apartment and her bank account have been emptied, and her husband has been murdered. The more Reggie learns, the more she realizes the scope of the puzzle, which she must solve to protect herself from ever-increasing danger.

programme.title: Breach
programme.desc: Eric O'Neill (Ryan Phillippe), a low-level surveillance expert with the FBI, believes he is accomplishing his dream of becoming a full-fledged agent, with his unexpected promotion and assignment to work with renowned agent Robert Hanssen (Chris Cooper). However, he soon learns the reason for his promotion is to gain Hanssen's trust and find proof that he is a traitor to the country.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: Mercy Christmas
programme.desc: When Michael Briskett meets the perfect woman, his ideal Christmas dream comes true when she invites him to her family's holiday celebration. Dreams shattered, Michael struggles to survive once he realizes HE will be Christmas dinner.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: Christmas in The Heartland
programme.desc: Kara and Jessie strike up an unlikely friendship when seated next to each other on a plane headed to the heartland. With both girls visiting family they've never met, they devise a plan to switch places for Christmas.

programme.title: Bad Girl
programme.desc: Summertime distances a father (Darrin Dewitt Henson) and his teenage daughter (Ajiona Alexus) until they discover the value of family and love.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Sparks Over Brooklyn
programme.desc: Single mom and chef Lilah is at odds with tech innovator Charlie who buys her family restaurant.

programme.title: My Mother's Future Husband
programme.desc: A mother and daughter work through the pain of the past so they can open their hearts to the future.

programme.title: Montage
programme.desc: A mother who lost her child to a kidnapper 15 years ago will not let the same crime happen again.

programme.title: Don't Buy The Seller
programme.desc: It all started with a second hand app. Soo-hyun's comment on the app makes her a serial killer's target.

programme.title: Angel is Dead
programme.desc: Do-Kyung meets Ga-In on a boat headed to an isolated island. At that night, they spend the night together.

programme.title: Secret Confession
programme.desc: In-man is a timid but caring man who creates a suicide group for his first night and suggests a 'bucket list'.

programme.title: But I'm Married
programme.desc: Kimora and Jamal's seemingly perfect marriage falters. Seeking to reignite passion, Kimora explores unconventional options, including a third person. This decision unleashes a web of lies and betrayal, forcing Kimora to confront hidden desires.

programme.title: Shotlanta
programme.desc: Mozzy, driven by a desire to lift his family out of poverty in Jamaica, emigrates to Atlanta. He quickly rises in the ranks of the city's drug trade, determined to achieve wealth and security for his mother and sister. However, his ruthless pursuit of success puts him on a dangerous path, where the line between ambition and destruction blurs.

programme.title: Boyz for Life
programme.desc: Detectives chase "Fufu," a villain who stole Escobar's stash from the LAPD. Hijinks ensue as they swap identities to protect a witness.

programme.title: 3 Way Poly
programme.desc: A young couple's experiment in intimacy spirals into a nightmare when they invite a seductive stranger into their home. Little do they know, she's a killer on the loose, and their lives hang by a thread.

programme.title: Alvarez Kelly
programme.desc: Alvarez Kelly (William Holden) is a Mexican cattle rancher who is doing his best to stay out of the Civil War. He has no interest in which side may win or lose -- Kelly is far more concerned about his own survival, and about making money. He soon finds himself in the middle of the conflict, however, when a confederate colonel (Richard Widmark) captures the rancher and forces Kelly to help his soldiers steal a nearby herd of cattle, which they desperately need for food.

programme.title: Two-Fisted Law
programme.desc: A rancher sets out to expose a gang of crooked cattle dealers who swindled him out of his property rights.

programme.title: Banjo Hackett
programme.desc: An 1880s horse trader (Don Meredith) helps his orphan nephew (Ike Eisenmann) find his Arabian mare, stolen by a bounty hunter.

programme.title: The Rough, Tough West
programme.desc: The Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) looks for his friend Big Jack (Jack Mahoney) and finds out that Jack is illegally commandeering the mines and claims of others.

programme.title: The Palomino
programme.desc: Steve Norris (Jerome Courtland), the heir to a meat-packing fortune, has a yearning to set out and forge a path of his own. His rebellious streak leads him to the broken down horse-breeding farm of the bewitching beauty Maria Guevara (Beverly Tyler). Enchanted by this determined young woman, Norris decides to assist her in saving her business. But this enrages duplicitous rival breeder Ben Lane (Roy Roberts), who steals away Guevara's prize palomino in an attempt to cripple her operation.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: Heroes of Fort Worth
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a group of confederate soldiers with the help of Apache Indians, try to defeat a Union fort, while trying to gain support from Emperor Maximillian of Mexico.

programme.title: 15 Scaffolds for a Murderer
programme.desc: Horse thieves are wrongfully accused of rape and murder. They flee the bloodthirsty lynch mob, taking refuge in an abandoned fort.

programme.title: The Deadly Trackers
programme.desc: Sean Kilpatrick (Richard Harris), a pacifist border-town sheriff, has used some unconventional methods to keep order in his tiny Texas town. But Kilpatrick's belief system is rocked when the villainous Frank Brand (Rod Taylor) and his gang murder Kilpatrick's family following a bank robbery that goes wrong. An enraged Kilpatrick trails the gang into Mexico, where he partners with local police officer Gutierrez (Al Lettieri) to bring down Brand once and for all.

programme.title: Forgotten Pistolero
programme.desc: Mann, a feared gunman, is informed that his father has been murdered by his mother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a man, eerily similar to a man he killed, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as an undercover agent and goes to investigate rumors of the sales of arms to renegade Indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians, Mark stays with Miss Milly, where he suffers from loneliness and doubt with his father gone for 2 months.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.sub-title: The Lost Treasure of Canyon Town
programme.desc: Lucas, Mark and Micah tangle with the Newman family and learn the secret of a town's 20-year-old mystery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Blinded in an explosion, Lucas fights despair as he prepares for a meeting with a gun-toting enemy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A traveling salesman can't talk his way out of an assault charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.

programme.title: Fort Apache
programme.desc: When arrogant and stubborn Civil War hero Lieutenant Colonel Owen Thursday (Henry Fonda) arrives in Arizona with his daughter, Philadelphia (Shirley Temple), to assume command of the Fort Apache outpost, he clashes with level-headed Captain Kirby York (John Wayne). Viewing the local Native Americans through an ignorantly negative lens, Thursday is determined to engage them in battle for his own glory, despite the warnings of York -- an act of folly that will have dire consequences.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: After the Civil War, rancher Thomas Dunson (James Arness) leads a dangerous cattle drive across Texas with a team that includes his adopted son, Matthew (Bruce Boxleitner), and black cowboy Jack Byrd (Stan Shaw), whose presence annoys some of the white cowboys. Fearful of Indians and struggling through the dry terrain, Dunson's men grow increasingly unhappy with his authoritarian ways. Fed up, rebellious Matthew goes to work for another ranch, infuriating his father.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: John Ford's landmark Western revolves around an assorted group of colorful passengers aboard the Overland stagecoach bound for Lordsburg, New Mexico, in the 1880s. An alcoholic philosophizer (Thomas Mitchell), a lady of ill repute (Claire Trevor) and a timid liquor salesman (Donald Meek) are among the motley crew of travelers who must contend with an escaped outlaw, the Ringo Kid (John Wayne), and the ever-present threat of an Apache attack as they make their way across the Wild West.

programme.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
programme.desc: The year is 1776, and newlyweds Gilbert (Henry Fonda) and Lana Martin (Claudette Colbert) have decided to take up a rural lifestyle. However, following the onset of the American Revolutionary War, the couple's quiet life in the Mohawk Valley is interrupted by violent attacks from Native Americans and Tories. The Martins refuse to succumb to the difficulties of their new life, though, as Lana takes on the responsibility of raising a child while Gilbert joins the colonists' militia.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Deceased Father Tapis leaves behind a hand organ at his mission, and Father de la Cuesta and Jose ponder its significance as the renegade Joaquin brings a gang to threaten them.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When a white settler dies on their reservation, Apache policemen must solve the murder before vigilantes take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: After the unscrupulous Manning cheats to secure an army freight contract, his competitors Red Eagle and Little Fawn must find a way to turn the situation in their favor.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A gambler's poker winnings include half of Tombstone, Ariz.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When a cook skims gold nuggets off miners while working at their camp, his assistant reaches out to his sister from Tucson in an attempt to save him from hanging.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.sub-title: How Death Valley Got Its Name
programme.desc: When wagons break off from a wagon train and begin to run dangerously low on food and water when they become trapped in a hot desert west of Salt Lake City.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The story of Aaron Winters, his wife Rosie and their discovery of borax in Death Valley.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A young bandit outwits a determined Sheriff at every turn.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two people set out into the desert in search of the lost "Pegleg" Mine.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Mamie, the grocer's daughter, plans to marry the suitor who corners the local egg market.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A hard-rock miner and champion driller is encouraged by a dance-hall girl to study law after he loses an arm in a shooting fracas.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A Bostonian who has married a local girl in a desert mining town refuses to invite the townspeople into his home on his wedding night, thereby instigating a three-day chivaree.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A quiet and retiring dressmaker for the dance-hall girls in a western mining camp is discovered to be Tiger Lil, a former dance-hall queen from Virginia City.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove: Return
programme.desc: Gus (Robert Duvall) is injured during an Indian attack Call (Tommy Lee Jones) has a final run-in with Blue Duck.

programme.title: Return to Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: After fulfilling Gus' last request to be buried in Texas, Woodrow Call (Jon Voight) heads back to Montana with a herd of mustangs for Hat Creek Cattle Co.

programme.title: Return to Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Having escaped the Kiowas, Call (Jon Voight) comes to a Cheyenne camp, where he takes a wife a prairie fire destroys Clara's ranch with a range war looming, Call refuses Dunnegan's request to join the Montana Cattleman's Alliance.

programme.title: Return to Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Dunnegan (Oliver Reed) tells Newt (Rick Schroder) he considers him a son Gideon (William Petersen) confides to Clara (Barbara Hershey) that Agostina (Nia Peeples) is Gus' daughter Call makes Agostina a partner in the Hat Creek Ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to ride shotgun on the North Fork stage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaws threaten to kill Micah unless their leader is freed.

programme.title: The Last Days of Frank and Jesse James
programme.desc: The outlaw brothers (Kris Kristofferson, Johnny Cash) go from the Civil War to robbing trains to farming under assumed names.

programme.title: The Concrete Cowboys
programme.desc: Two Montana cowboys (Jerry Reed, Tom Selleck) head for Nashville and help a woman (Morgan Fairchild) find her sister.

programme.title: The Warrant: Breaker's Law
programme.desc: A warrant brings Marshal John Breaker and Deputy Bugle Bearclaw cross country to deliver a criminal.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock (John Wayne), a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans. As McLintock tries to juggle his various adversaries, his wife, who left him two years previously, suddenly returns. But she isn't interested in her husband -- she wants custody of their daughter.

programme.title: Circle
programme.sub-title: s With Clint Black: Circling Back
programme.desc: Clint Black looks back on his favorite moments of Season 5.

programme.title: Circle
programme.sub-title: s With Clint Black: Raul Malo
programme.desc: The Mavericks frontman Raul Malo discusses songwriting in Nashville, Tenn., and the evolution of the country music genre.

programme.title: Blue Steel
programme.desc: Undercover federal marshal John Carruthers (John Wayne) is suspected by the local sheriff, Jake (George Hayes), of stealing the town's payroll, but his suspicions are sidelined when young Betty Mason (Eleanor Hunt) announces that her father, an important businessman, has been murdered. Without him, supplies will not reach town, and homesteaders will starve. When town leader Malgrove (Edward Peil) offers to buy the locals out, John and Jake get suspicious, and uncover a land-grabbing conspiracy.

programme.title: The Trail Beyond
programme.desc: Fresh out of college, American Rod Drew (John Wayne) is asked to assist in the search for missing people in Canada. Accompanied by Wabi (Noah Beery Jr.), his friend from school, Drew travels north, but quickly gets into a confrontation with a gang of French Canadian outlaws. When the bandits abduct the young Felice Newsome (Verna Hillie), it becomes apparent they're responsible for the other disappearances as well. Luckily, Drew and Wabi are there, determined to find and free the captives.

programme.desc: The Martins become attached to Timmy and Lassie.

programme.desc: Lassie saves Timmy's bait business.

programme.desc: Lassie refuses to part with her old blanket.

programme.desc: Lassie is jealous of a pair of rabbits.

programme.desc: Lassie gets a concussion at a road construction site.

programme.desc: Uncle Petrie thinks he has discovered the Fountain of Youth.

programme.desc: Timmy has an emergency appendectomy.

programme.desc: A crow saves Uncle Petrie's life.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson's prejudice troubles a former circus dwarf (Billy Barty) who is trying to raise his daughter alone.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Townspeople rescue a mute boy whom a carnival owner has been using as an attraction.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mr. Edwards is determined the carnival owner will not regain custody of the mute boy.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nancy gets angry when her competition, Mrs. Nellie Oleson Dalton, visits Walnut Grove.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Walnut Grove's citizens are delighted over a new railroad, then learn many farmers will lose their land.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay hits the road to help struggling restaurants all over the United States turn their luck around. Ramsay examines the problems each establishment faces, from unsanitary refrigerators to lazy or inexperienced staff, and searches for resolutions. With help from his team, Ramsay redecorates each eatery to give it a fresh new look and updates the menu as needed. Ramsay's ultimate goal is to make the restaurants he visits popular and profitable, but it's up to the restaurateurs to take his advice and turn their business nightmare into the American dream.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Did you ever wonder what goes into making a TV show like Project Smoke? Come behind the scenes for a unique look at how we bring the show to life, from building the set to smoking the food. Plus, get the inside scoop on never before seen recipes, some of our favorite dishes, and other smoky surprises.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: A show devoted to the most awesome cut of meat to grill: steak. Up first, a magisterial Wood-Grilled Beef Tomahawk Steak topped with Pt. Reyes Blue Cheese Butter. Followed by a four-finger thick Cherry-Smoked New York Strip Steak. Then a plancha-seared "steak" from the sea: Bacon-Wrapped Albacore Tuna "Filet Mignons" sauced with Peppercorn Cream Sauce.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: A show to stoke our insatiable appetite for fiery foods, starting with smoky Nashville Hot Wings. From rural Kentucky come smoky grilled pork shoulder steaks to dunk in incendiary vinegar cayenne pepper sauce. For more pain, we present Piri Piri Prawns grilled in the shell with a distinctive hot sauce, followed by Indian Tandoori Lamb served with Hell's Fury Hot Sauce and cucumber yogurt raita.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Fresh local fish hits the grill in this show, which is devoted to the art of grilling seafood. Local Channel Island rockfish roasts on a Himalayan salt slab, served with Melon Mint Relish. Tuna steaks come spice-rubbed and grill-blackened, sauced with Cajun Remoulade. Next, fire-roasted shrimp with Deconstructed Pesto. And for smoked fish lovers, Alaskan king salmon smoked over maple wood.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Poultry is one of the most versatile meats to cook over fire. From the Republic of Georgia comes tabaka, citrusy butterflied chickens grilled under a press with piquant Rhubarb Tkemali sauce. From Fez, grilled chicken and onion kebabs marinated in Charmoula. Pound cake gets the grill treatment with fresh berry "salsa" and whipped cream. Finally, a smoke-roasted turkey with butter and truffles.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Pan-Asian pit masters (and mistresses) developed a grill culture that celebrates the "fifth taste," umami. Striped bass is stuffed and grilled before it's doused with hot sesame oil. Thai Beef Salad is a mosaic of color and textures. Corn comes basted with sesame soy butter and finished with fire-toasted coconut. Last up, pounded chicken thighs get basted with Beijing Barbecue Sauce.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Smoke is the soul of barbecue. In this episode, you'll learn how to smoke duck breasts. Cherry salsa underscores duck's affinity for fruit. Vegetarians and meat eaters will devour our cheese and bean-stuffed poblanos and smoked mushroom bread pudding. But if it's carnivores you're feeding, smoke a hefty awe-inspiring beef shoulder clod. A tangy mustard barbecue sauce makes the perfect complement.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: In this "surf and turf" show, a marine biologist brings ocean-fresh sea urchins for Steven to grill. Local spiny lobster is split and roasted in the shell directly on the embers. Meanwhile, Alaskan king crab gets grilled and served with garlicky absinthe butter. Representing turf are bone-in veal chops blasted with rosemary smoke and beef plate ribs, spit-roasted on a wood-burning rotisserie.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show goes whole hog! Up first, pastrami bacon made by brine-curing pork belly, rubbing it with a pastrami rub, and finally slow-smoking it over hardwood. Then an apple cider-based brine and rum-spiked finishing glaze pork chops. Next, "pork and beans" like you've never seen them. Finally, rings of sweet onions are doused with hot sauce, spiraled with bacon, and crisped over the fire.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show celebrates the holy BBQ trinity of barbecue: pork ribs, brisket, and pulled pork. America's favorite ribs—baby backs—are glazed with an unexpected ingredient. Beef brisket and baked beans star in crispy grilled tostadas. An amazing BBQ Titans' brisket with espresso in the barbecue sauce. Finally, pulled pork marinated in an umami-rich Korean chili paste called gochujang.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Its bright but complex flavors and affinity for smoke and fire have fueled the obsession with Mexican food and drink north of the border. Tomatoes, onions, and chiles are roasted in the coals to make an unforgettable salsa. Quesadillas conceal a perfectly cooked egg. Then, a Grilled Nopalitos Corn Salad and chipotle-marinated pork tenderloin. To finish, pineapple slices flambéed with mezcal.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show highlights the conviviality of a South American cookout. The secrets to recreate the pollo served in Peruvian enclaves will be revealed in this episode. Little known in the U.S. is choripan, a kind of Andean hot dog. Finally, Brazilian churrasco is made of spit-roast picanha (top sirloin cap), chicken thighs, kielbasa, peppers, and onions—all served with a Brazilian country-style salsa.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Victory will be yours! Start the party with chicken legs smoke-roasted over maple wood, then glazed with a fiery fusion of maple syrup and sriracha. A quartet of grilled and smoked beans appears in a colorful side dish. Next up, a trio of internationally-inspired burgers: inside-out American-style burgers Greek-style spiced lamb burgers and kaffir lime-scented Thai veal burgers.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Over a decade after the game changing Longbeard XR was introduced by Winchester, the wait is finally over for their next ground breaking turkey load. After years of perfecting the recipe behind the scenes, Winchester finally unveiled the new Longbeard TSS at a turkey camp in northern Michigan. First watch the jaw dropping Longbeard TSS pattern board testing, then see it go to work on some spring gobblers.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Hunting Black Swan and Shoveler: New Zealand | The Journey WIthin
programme.desc: Mark is still on the South Island of New Zealand chasing the Wingshooting Slam. It's Mark's last day to complete the waterfowl portion of the slam and he still needs a Black Swan and a Shoveler. This hunt is taking place on a freshwater lake right off the ocean. The temperature is unusually warm for this time of year, but thankfully that hasn't affected the numbers of birds around.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Spot and Stalk White - Lipped Peccary
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is south of the border in Veracruz, Mexico going after a Mexican Gulf Coast Whitetail. When the whitetail action slowed down, Mark tried his luck at a spot-and stalk hunt for White-lipped Peccary. With hot temps, Mark and company try to find water that the Peccary will be targeting to stay hydrated.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode, Slade shows us around some of his investment properties, and Ryan kills a nice bull elk in New Mexico.

This week we celebrate the 40th Anniversary of Lone Wolf stands and the man that started it all, the Lone Wolf himself Andrae D'Acquisto. As we take a look back at Andrae's career, how it all started and where its heading after 4 decades, Andrae shares some insights on his hunting strategies and the equipment he has designed that made him one of the top bowhunters in the country!

programme.title: The Hunted Land & Sea
programme.sub-title: The Hunted Land & Sea - "North Dakota Pheasants Part One
programme.desc: Gerry Holland heads to North Dakota to hunt pheasant with his father in law Joe Myers, their extended family and bird dogs.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.sub-title: Browning Films - "No Country for Old Ducks
programme.desc: Kyle Barefield and Cole Barthel are on a week long mission to find the ducks in the central flyway. The weather is starting to push the ducks down in to TX and OK but the heavy rainfall has spread them out. It takes constant scouting and adapting to the changes each day to stay on the ducks in order to shoot limits.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: For decades, Paul Butski has set the standard in turkey calling. His name is etched into the NWTF Grand National Calling Championships Hall of Fame, and his influence stretches far beyond the stage. He didn't just win competitions, he shaped the way we talk to turkeys – and more importantly, the way we hunt them.

programme.title: The Huntsman
programme.sub-title: The Huntsman - "The fall that changed the hunt | Australian Fallow deer & goat hunt
programme.desc: Join Chris Waters and his friends Jordi and Dodge as they head off into the wilds of New South Wales, Australia on the hunt for wild Fallow deer and goat. Everything was going swell until one fateful fall... If you love hunting trips with mates, wild places, wild game cooking and action-packed stalks you'll love this hunting video.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: Catch all of the deer that have hit the dirt over the last few seasons on The Raven right here.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.sub-title: The Raven Project - "I-70 and The River Farm
programme.desc: Randy and Cody are wrapping things up on the Raven before bow season arrives in Missouri. Planting I-70 the plot where Randy killed one of his biggest Missouri bucks ever last year. Then Randy and Cody attempt to setup a new farm they are calling “The River Farm” they attempt to plant a food plot, bush hog, spray the plot, setup a new Titan blind, and setup a Hooyman dual perimeter fence all in one day before the sun goes down.

programme.title: Behind The Draw
programme.sub-title: Behind The Draw - "These Species Could Overrun Your Hunting Farms
programme.desc: Matt Dye from ‪Land and Legacy came to visit the HB farm for a complete consult. We break down the entire farm and how we can improve it in every aspect. In this video we target invasive species on the farm in the first half. In the second half, Shawn goes over some of the common invasive species found and how to combat them.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats
programme.desc: In Episode 3, Josh starts off in the Twin Cities where he meets up with Yia Vang, an award-winning Hmong chef and restaurant owner, bringing his family's traditions and flavors to the American Midwest. As Josh heads up north to Duluth and the boundary waters, he'll meet plenty of farmers and foragers—harvesting mushrooms, wild rice, and catching a few fish (and waves) along the way. It all wraps up with an epic feast hosted by Yia back in the cities.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE
programme.desc: New. York. City. That's where our host Josh Rosen kicks off his journey in Episode 4—and where he lived for 16 years and started up the surf-centric apparel brand, Saturdays NYC. Back in his old stomping grounds, Josh first meets up with the award-winning chef and Mumbai native, Chintan Pandya, currently blowing up the New York food scene with his unapologetic and authentic Indian cuisine (pro tip: try the goat brains). Next, Josh travels through the boroughs, heads upstate, and along the coast to source local ingredients—from sake brewers and pig farmers to catching fresh lobster just 100 miles from Wall Street. As always the adventure will end with a feast, right back in Chintan's kitchen.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Alaskan Fishing, Foraging, & Mountainside Cooking with Local Legends
programme.desc: Hop in the float plane—a new episode of DIRT just dropped. The DIRT crew made their way to Alaska, “the land of earth, sea, and sky.” All feast, no sleep is the name of the game as Josh makes the most of Alaska's abundant and legendary daylight alongside local guides, fishermen, and even a couple grizzlies. There'll be plenty of time to hibernate in winter. But for now—join us—there are halibut to filet, rainforest 'shrooms to forage, and mountainside meals to cook up.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When a man (Christopher Lloyd) claiming to be Fester, the missing brother of Gomez Addams (Raul Julia), arrives at the Addams' home, the family is thrilled. However, Morticia (Anjelica Huston) begins to suspect the man is a fraud, since he cannot recall details of Fester's life. With the help of lawyer Tully Alford (Dan Hedaya), Fester manages to get the Addams clan evicted from their home. Gomez realizes the two men are conspiring to swindle the Addams fortune and that he must challenge Fester.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: The members of the odd Addams Family are up to more macabre antics in this sequel. This time around, Gomez Addams (Raul Julia) and his wife, Morticia (Anjelica Huston), are celebrating the arrival of a baby boy. But siblings Wednesday (Christina Ricci) and Pugsley (Jimmy Workman) are none too happy about the new addition, and try their best to eliminate the infant. When nanny Debbie Jelinsky (Joan Cusack) appears to keep the kids in line, her presence leads to an unexpected treacherous twist.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong Still Smokin'
programme.desc: Stoners Cheech (Cheech Marin) and Chong (Thomas Chong) reunite and head to Amsterdam for a film festival after getting tickets from a promoter (Hans Man in 't Veld) in L.A. When they show up at a celebrity party, Cheech is mistaken for Burt Reynolds, and Chong for Dolly Parton. The duo rolls with it as they roll more joints, partake in the usual antics and eat every item -- which includes a lot of mushrooms -- on the menu at Amsterdam's Bvlgar Café.

programme.title: The Dictator
programme.desc: Gen. Aladeen (Sacha Baron Cohen) has ruled the oil-rich North African country of Wadiya since the age of six, when 97 stray bullets and a hand grenade killed his father in a hunting accident. After an assassination attempt takes the life of yet another body-double, Tamir (Ben Kingsley), Aladeen's uncle and most trusted adviser, convinces Aladeen to go to New York. Unfortunately, Aladeen has a less-than-friendly reception from exiled Wadiyans, who want their country freed from his despotic rule.

programme.desc: Blazing Saddles In this satirical take on Westerns, crafty railroad worker Bart (Cleavon Little) becomes the first black sheriff of Rock Ridge, a frontier town about to be destroyed in order to make way for a new railroad. Initially, the people of Rock Ridge harbor a racial bias toward their new leader. However, they warm to him after realizing that Bart and his perpetually drunk gunfighter friend (Gene Wilder) are the only defense against a wave of thugs sent to rid the town of its population.

programme.title: Andy Woodhull
programme.desc: Andy recently appeared on Conan on TBS. Around that same time, his half-hour special premiered on Comedy Central. He was the first comedian to make his network television debut on “The Tonight Show starring Jimmy Fallon”. He also appeared on Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen, and Gotham Comedy Live on AXS. He had also appeared on Comedy Central's “Live at Gotham” in 2009.

programme.title: Marty Simpson
programme.desc: Former high school football coach and drama teacher, Marty Simpson jokes about how to punish teenagers, getting rid of 500 bats in his attic, and how his love language is sarcasm.

programme.title: Steve Bruner
programme.desc: Steve Bruner looks like a perfectly normal guy—until he opens his mouth. He's delivered his laser-sharp humor on Comedy Club Network (Showtime), An Evening at the Improv (A&E), Into the Night (ABC), and The Byron Allen Show (NBC), to name a few.

programme.title: Tom Foss
programme.desc: Tom Foss has traveled around the world entertaining our troops. Including 5 tours to Iraq, 6 tours of Afghanistan, 11 tours of the middle east, 4 tours of Europe, 3 tours of the Far East, Greenland, 5 aircraft carriers, support ships and bases all around the United States. While not on tour overseas Foss keeps his foot on the ground as a regular at the Improvs, Funnybones and the world famous Hollywood Comedy Store.

programme.title: Key Lewis
programme.sub-title: Half Black, Half White, Looks Mexican
programme.desc: Sacramento California born Key Lewis is a high energy, improvisational, storytelling, multiple-personality nutcase! His love for the people and hunger for the stage is his undying motivation. His comedic stories about his interracial childhood, family, and unusual views on relationships, make Key simply a joy to watch. His ability to improvise and interact with all types of crowds makes this up and coming comic and actor one to look out for. Key Lewis has appeared on Marlon Wayans TBSís Funniest Wins, Starz Networks StaannDup, Kevin Harts One Mic Stand as well as Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes! Key says, chase your dream, always know your audience donít act funny, be funny... donít worry about the quantity of your material but the quality the sooner you create a relationship with your crowd, the better you will be. Television: Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes on TVONE. BETíS One Mic Stand Hosted by Kevin Hart. Starz Network Comedy Series called StaannDup, Marlon Wayanís TBSís Funniest Wins! Competitions: Winner of the 2013 Rocky Mountain Laugh Off, Finalist in the 2010 Bay Area Black Comedy Competition, Semi-Finalist 2009 San Francisco International Comedy Competition, a Semi-Finalist in the 2008 Boston Comedy Festival, 2007 Seattle International Comedy Competition Finalist, Shades of Laughs Portland Oregon Winner, TVONE Bill Bellamyís Who Got Jokeís Contestant. Radio: Improv work with FM Morning Shows (Top 40 Radio): KSFM 102.5 (Sacramento, CA), KWOD 106.5 (Sacramento, CA) KWIN 97.7 ñ Stockton/Lodi, CA, Mix 107.9 Salt Lake City UT (Is It Racist Segment) & The Man Panel. Concerts/Festivals: Opened for Jon B. and Keysha Cole, Taste Of Tacoma, & Bite Of Seattle Fountain Stage 5 Years Running! Key Lewis has worked with the likes of Kevin Hart, Pablo Francisco, Sam Bam, Alonzo Bodden, Jay London, Gabriel Iglesias, Brooks McBeth, Tommy Davidson, Katt Williams, De-Ray Davis, Andrew Norelli, Lonnie Love, Jeff Garcia, Damon Wayans, Joey Diaz, Guy Torry, Darren Carter, Paul Mooney, Kermet Apio and many more.

programme.title: Matt Knudsen
programme.desc: Matt Knudsen was born in Hawaii, raised in the Mid-west and sailed around the world as a merchant marine. As an actor, Matt shared the big screen with Oscar winner Sean Penn in Gangster Squad, or you may also recognize him from his appearances in shows like Crazy Ex-Girlfriend, Key & Peele, Workaholics, The League, Big Love, Boston Legal or Malcolm in the Middle just to name a few. Matt has also been a part of several high profile commercial campaigns for companies including: Apple, IBM, GE, Volkswagen, DirecTV, Pepsi and more which have aired during the Superbowl and The Olympics. As a comedian, he's appeared on Conan, The Late Late Show, Last Call, ASX Live and Comics Unleashed, as well as dozens of festivals, including: Montreal Just for Laughs (Best of the Fest), The San Francisco Sketchfest, Bridgetown, High Plains, Limestone and has even entertained at The White House for President and Mrs. Obama.

programme.title: Street Smart
programme.desc: Jonathan Fisher (Christopher Reeve) is a reporter struggling to keep his job at a magazine. Assigned to write a real-life prostitution exposé, he fails to gain information from his subjects and decides to make up his own story about a pimp. The piece revives his career, but his fictional character turns out to be strangely similar to Fast Black (Morgan Freeman), an actual pimp, who is outraged and demands that Jonathan spill his sources. When the police get involved, matters get even uglier.

programme.title: Tabloid
programme.desc: One of America's top documentary filmmakers, Errol Morris, turns his attention to the outrageous and nearly unbelievable story of Joyce McKinney. She's a former Miss Wyoming beauty queen who gained a great deal of notoriety after being accused of kidnapping a young Mormon missionary, restraining him in chains and raping him in England in 1977. The unbalanced McKinney is interviewed extensively, particularly about her ambition to write a memoir telling her side of the tale.

programme.desc: Although Jason (William Ragsdale) works as a department store clerk, he is also a reincarnated prince. Long ago, his beloved Jessie (Kristy Swanson) was snatched away from him by an evil wizard (Terry Kiser) who used his powers to transform her into wooden statue. Now Jessie is in Jason's department store as a mannequin. When he encounters her, she awakens from her thousand-year sleep. They quickly revive their romance, but the evil wizard has been reincarnated as well, and he's up to no good.

programme.title: Tank Girl
programme.desc: After a comet disrupts the rain cycle of Earth, the planet has become a desolate, barren desert by the year 2033. With resources scarce, Kesslee (Malcolm McDowell) -- head of the powerful and evil Water & Power Corporation, the de facto government -- has taken control of the water supply. Unwilling to cower under Kesslee's tyrannical rule, a pair of outlaws known as Tank Girl (Lori Petty) and Jet Girl (Naomi Watts) rise up, joining the mysterious rebel Rippers to destroy the corrupt system.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Anaconda is an action-packed thriller starring JENNIFER LOPEZ (The Wedding Planner), rap superstar ICE CUBE (XXX: State of the Union), Academy Award®-winner JON VOIGHT (1978 Best Actor, Coming Home) and ERIC STOLTZ (Almost Famous). A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale (Stoltz) and director Terri Flores (Lopez), ventures into the world's most isolated jungle - the Amazon - in search of a lost and forgotten civilization. Early in their journey, they come to the aid of Paul Serone, a Paraguayan guide (Voight), who joins their expedition. But Serone is actually a poacher on the trail of a legendary snake. When Serone hijacks the boat and its crew on his quest to track and kill the giant snake, he steers the expedition right into the path of the deadly monster. Ger ready for a wild, scare-a-minute thrill ride because ANACONDA will grab you and take your breath away.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: The journey leads through one of the most fascinating delta landscapes in the world. Starting in the untouched jungle of the Tumucumaque in the north of the Amazon delta, the journey continues south by boat across the 30 kilometre wide river to the Ilha de Maraj. The largest river island in the world, as large as Switzerland, is surrounded by wide beaches, mangrove forests and floodplain forests. On the island untouched jungle and wet savannah characterise the land. Fishermen and aai farmers live from the fruits of nature on the edge of the numerous river veins and flood plains and the collection of medicinal plants serves here, far away from civilization, as a living for the people. On the south side of the delta in the city of Belem we explore the exotic world of the famous Ver-o-Peso market with its impressive variety of fish, tropical fruits, spices and medicinal herbs.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.sub-title: Rhine-Meuse Delta The Land of Canals
programme.desc: In the heart of Europe lies a unique biotope and a landscape characterised by water: the Rhine-Meuse Delta. Around a third of the Netherlands lies in the heart of Europe, below sea level, with 3,500 polders as a buffer for excess water and numerous cities crossed by canals. It is also a region where nature borders directly on cities, where intensive agriculture gradually leaves its place to the water, where the largest nature parks are in the immediate vicinity of Rotterdam's largest industrial port. From the sources of the Waal to the port of Rotterdam, we encounter protected plant, bird and mammal species, as well as the Delta inhabitants who have created this unique habitat.

programme.title: Wild Wild East

programme.title: Wild Wild East

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gir National Park: India - Asia's Last Lion
programme.desc: In the west of India live wildcats which you wouldn't expect in India: lions. They live and roam freely in a surrounding where natives live as well. The Maldhari are proud to live in a region together with the lions, although they kill their cattle now and then. The north of Gujarat is mostly a desert where seminomads live. The Fakirani Jat breed a very special camel race: Karai-Camels which are able to swim. The camels swim daily around 3 kilometres to mangrove islands to feed.

programme.title: Wild Korea

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Kinabatangan River: Borneo - Forgotten Paradise
programme.desc: The Kinabatangan winds for over 560 kilometres across the north of Borneo. Nowhere else in Sabah live as many wild and rare animals as along the river: Orang-Utans, Elephants, crocodiles and proboscis monkeys. But the biodiversity is endangered because more and more palm oil plantations replace the rainforest. The natives fight for the preservation of the forest and the unique wildlife.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends. The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community. Plum suggests that she teach music lessons Plum has always wanted to learn the drums, as it would enhance her ability to give dance lessons with live rhythmic accompaniment.

programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores—everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy. During Raspberry's preliminary trip to the city to begin arrangements for her new design studio, her friends get a taste of life without her. They miss her, and it makes them sad. Cherry admits to Strawberry that she's concerned for Raspberry—stardom is not all it's cracked up to be. We see that Cherry was worried about her friend, not jealous. Raspberry returns to pack up her little boutique. Her friends barely recognize her.

programme.title: Blippi's Fun and Colorful Exploration
programme.desc: Get ready for a vibrant and entertaining escapade with Blippi as he dives into a world of colors at Billy Beez, creates a whimsical pizza in the kitchen, transforms into a playful pirate on a treasure hunt, and explores the fascinating world of dinosaurs at the Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History. Each adventure is packed with laughter, creativity, and educational moments, making learning a joyful experience for kids.

programme.title: Blippi's Fun and Colorful Exploration
programme.desc: Get ready for a vibrant and entertaining escapade with Blippi as he dives into a world of colors at Billy Beez, creates a whimsical pizza in the kitchen, transforms into a playful pirate on a treasure hunt, and explores the fascinating world of dinosaurs at the Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History. Each adventure is packed with laughter, creativity, and educational moments, making learning a joyful experience for kids.

programme.title: The Berry Big Harvest
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store. Soon Orange's store is overflowing with Berry Bitty Fruits & Veggies. It's the berry first time Orange has not been able to find a “place for everything” in her store.

programme.title: No Blueberry Is an Island
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does, so they can prepare accordingly—they see Strawberry wearing a diving mask and snorkel in the cafe, and race to the lake to practice scuba diving, not knowing she was only slicing onions.

programme.title: Where the Berry Breeze Blows
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here! She insists they can build a copy of “Berry Breezy Bay” resort on Berry Bitty Lake, a duplicate down to the last detail.

programme.title: I Want Cake!
programme.desc: Sid and his friends discover that only eating cake would make their bodies feel terrible. Then they explore and learn that the best way to stay healthy is by eating nutritious food.

programme.title: Timmy Time Narrated
programme.desc: Timmy is a little lamb with a lot to learn! Season 3, episodes 17 - 20. Narrated.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Alphablocks - How Now, Brown Cow?: The Alphablocks meet their match when the Brown Cow and her singing friends Owl, Howl and Growl take the stage. This episode introduces the OW letter team and the words cow, brown, own, howl, growl, gown, crown, town and down.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Alphablocks - Ants: A, N and T sit down for a nice picnic, but soon something is tickling everyone and making food disappear. This episode has fun with letter blends and the words ant, ants, pants, pans, taps, snap and picnic.

programme.title: Alphablocks

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: When the Moon was Missing // Trouble in a Bubble
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Treasure Lost, A Treasure Found // Dazzling Dumplings
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Dolphin Dilemma // Ruby and the Beast
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: When the Moon was Missing // Trouble in a Bubble
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: The Rainbow Wave // The Best Pet You Never Met
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Colorful Way to Cool Off // Seeing in Believing
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke.
