programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Pond Pirates // The Coolest Girl I Know
programme.desc: When Rev's dad tells about him about treasure sunken in the pond, Rev and Avery set out on a pirate adventure! They outfit Rumble and Alley with new dive equipment to salvage the long-lost toys and cherished memories found within the chest. // When Rev's cousin Katie comes to visit, Avery's jealousy gets the best of her-Avery always thought she was the coolest girl Rev knew! Intent on outdoing Katie, Avery pulls a stunt that she comes to regret.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev finds out that Bo wants to be a Police Kid, he tells a white lie to make him one for a day! Officer Bo takes the new job too far, ticketing everyone-for everything. Rev will have to tell the truth to fix this mess and get his friend back! // At Camp Sleepaway, Bo is homesick. His friends try to lift his spirits, but after a stinky trip to the outhouse, he's had enough! That is...until a suggestion from Rev helps Bo to see the beauty all around. Maybe camp isn't so bad after all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Gear Up Garage Band // First Aid Fun
programme.desc: At band practice, Rumble struggles to control his nervous backfiring, even damaging the instruments by accident! Determined not to give up on the festival, the gang improvises and uses makeshift instruments. They even feature Rumble's nervous twitch! // When Rev and Owen begrudgingly agree to join Bo's First Aid Games, they do everything BUT take the lessons seriously. It isn't long before the boys find out that first aid isn't all fun and games, but it IS totally awesome!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bo to the Rescue // Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: When Bo messes up on a few rescue missions, he decides to quit Bo's Rescue Hotline. Wanting to help their friend, the gang creates fake emergencies for Bo to solve. But as the friends find out, it takes more than trickery to build self-confidence! // As a heatwave hits Fender Bend, Rev and his friends look forward to Ice Cream Dream Day! But when the ice cream truck breaks down, it's up to the gang to find a way to deliver the tasty treats before they all melt.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend // Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in...

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev, Rumble and their friends help capture a group of wayward llamas, they each try and claim sole credit for the round up. Rev's parents listen patiently to the elaborate tales, each one starring a different hero, before ruling it a team effort! // When Avery creates a magnetic modification for Rumble, it seems to be the perfect solution. Now Rumble can help them tidy up the Gear Up Garage! But things get complicated when Rumble turns into a super-magnet, attracting all kinds of metal debris!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Fender Bend Friend Day // The Rev & Rumble Fan Club
programme.desc: Rev wants to surprise his friends with a movie celebrating their friendship, so he secretly gathers footage to show they're the best friends ever. When Avery realizes what he's up to, she adds her own clips to the movie - surprising Rev as well! // Owen hosts a virtual review of the gang's adventures with Rev and Rumble, plus all of their awesome gear! He walks his viewers through some of their most memorable moments, from mega stunts to monsters to rescue missions.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: After many years of working hard on Accelerator Acres, Tilly the tractor is ready to retire from ranch life. Rev wants to find her the perfect new job, but his ideas are too intense for old Tilly. He'll have to adjust to her slower pace first. // Rev and the gang compete for the title of Best Prankster-except Lori sits out, claiming pranks aren't her thing. After a full day of pranks and laughs, the kids gather for the big party that Lori planned for them...but all is not as it seems!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her to stay, showing her that Fender Bend is the best place to live-despite Avery's protests that she's too busy. Finally, Avery confronts their strange behaviour.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: Rev is sure he has the perfect plan to catch an elusive frog, but Avery isn't so sure. After all of his attempts fall through, he's finally ready to accept help-and Avery's idea just might work! Will they finally catch the Green Phantom? // Rev and Avery compete to transport supplies to town for a big event. Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. Covered in goop and debris, Rumble scares them into thinking he's the Beast! Avery hatches a plan to trap the "Beast" and save Rumble, who's gone missing

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When Rumble cracks his mirror, he thinks it gave him bad luck, and his confidence takes a hit. Even after Rev fixes the mirror and bolsters his pal, the bad luck continues. But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: The Day Henry Met
programme.desc: Everyday Henry meets something new - The day Henry met a Whale! The day Henry met the Moon!, The day Henry met a Car! How exciting, I wonder what Henry's going to meet today?

programme.title: Cocobi Sing-Alongs Toys
programme.desc: Sing along to popular kid's songs with Cocobi toys!

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Ted the Train - Let's harvest the colourful veggies!: It's harvest time! Let's help Ted gather as many delicious, healthy, and colourful veggies as we can find in the allotment!

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Ted the Train - Let's make colourful slushies!: Slushies are so yummy! Let's make some with Ted and learn what colours the different flavours come in!

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: The Construction Squad builds Car City brick by brick! They're proof that everything's possible with a little help from our friends.

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Helper Car
programme.desc: Cartoon for kids about helper cars: a fire truck, an ambulance, a police car and a tow truck. Why these cars and trucks are useful? Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.desc: The Babies are curious little cars whose sense of wonder always leads them into fantastic adventures—and sometimes trouble!

programme.title: One Zeez
programme.desc: The One Zeez make music as they explore our world, learning to stomp like a dinosaur, flip like a shark and jiggle like skeletons.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER.

programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs

Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: Spit Take!

programme.title: Grim Vengeance

programme.title: Crown Control

programme.title: The Promised Crown Affair
programme.desc: Izzie has vanished into the dream world, and the dream chasers struggle to maintain normalcy in the waking world while secretly searching for her.

programme.title: Friends Reunite
programme.desc: Olly about how his obsession is affecting their relationships. Olly refuses to see the damage he's causing, but it becomes clear that he's lost touch with what really matters.

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a "rites of passage" stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trance-like visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrive at a cavern overrun by thieves terrorizing the good townfolk, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid-the only one the Eastern Caverns have ever seen. However, their plan goes awry when Underlord Holt arrives and commands the thieves to work together to bring him Pronto-dead or alive!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang travel to the Auroris Mine, they discover a legendary monster carved out of stone attacking the mines-the Pyritor. Trixie studies the legend to help them locate the creature's home and put a stop to its reign of terror, but first they must confront the true nature of the beast, and its assistant!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade. Building the new upgrade is difficult...but working with the Technician is practically impossible!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A winter-time holiday has arisen in the Eastern Caverns around the mysterious "Giver," who makes an annual visit to deliver slugs to the people of the East. But when a group of thieves make off with the Giver's precious cargo of slugs, our heroes must ride to the rescue-and discover the secret of who the Giver really is.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Pronto accidentally uses the Emperor's sword blaster, he can suddenly do no wrong. Lady Dai-Fu manipulates Underlord Holt into trapping the Shane Gang with a new superweapon: the Iron Warrior!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Emperor has returned! After the Shane Gang failed to defeat the Iron Warrior, the Emperor sets to work creating even more Unstoppable Warriors to reclaim the Eastern Caverns. The Shane Gang search for a way to defeat the new creations, but when the Emperor places a bounty on Junjie's head, they also have to deal with the Dai-Fu and hordes of the Emperor's Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends and even some old enemies-to help them take down the Emperor.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro with Eli's old blaster and teaching him to live by the slugslinger's code. Tad takes to it like a natural, and as Kord says, it looks like they have another "slugslinging savant from the Surface" on their hands. But their training will be put to the test when Tad accompanies them to a showdown with the Scrap Force...and the Shadow Clan!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, but the Gang have to set off without him when reports start coming in of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns. As they pursue the trail of missing slugs, the mystery grows darker when it leads them straight to Dr. Blakk's old stronghold!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 1
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane is a regular kid except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each who has journied from the surface to protect Slugterra and the slugs that make the world special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 1
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane is a regular kid except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each who has journied from the surface to protect Slugterra and the slugs that make the world special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 2
programme.desc: Now its Eli's turn to be Slugterra's next Shane - whether he's ready or not! Unfortunately, the slugslinging tournament he enters to prove that he's ready, pretty quickly shows that he's not! So when word of this new Shane reaches the ears of the nefarious Dr. Blakk, he's not too worried... yet.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear. When Eli has second thoughts they go back to get it, only to learn that it's been sold to Dr. Blakk, along with hundreds of others to be transformed into feral Ghoul Slugs. Eli refuses to let his slug or any other get ghouled, so the team breaks in to Blakk's fortress to free them. While inside, they learn of Blakk's plan to conquer Slugterra.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica vuelve a casa y se encuentra con noticias impactantes. Tras una llamada de su hija Rutila, Aurelio recorre Los Ángeles en busca del Turco y su familia.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Ximena confiesa que no ama al Turco, que solo sintió agradecimiento por él. Después de matar a Ronnie, Aurelio encuentra a su exesposa, quien le dice que nunca volverá con él.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Patricia hace un discurso memorable contra Antonia y despierta la admiración de todos. A Aníbal pronto le darán de alta. Lucho le roba a Antonia y Rodrigo rompe relaciones con ella.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro golpea con una rabia descontrolada a Macario y termina en la comisaría. Beltrán no podrá salir de prisión, por ahora. Constanza y Gastón encuentran la llave secreta de Antonia.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Alondra, maniatada y amordazada, ve a su padre, después de 10 años. Ernesto la libera y le pide que vuelva con su familia, pero ella se niega. Max no quiere que Jennifer se acerque a Eliza.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Filtrándose como reportero y luego como parte de la seguridad del Cónsul, Joel libera a Alondra pero Ernesto insiste, la persigue y otra vez se la lleva. Julián reconoce a Sofía en un video.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Los lindos recuerdos con sus hijos y lo bien que la pasaban, hacen de un encuentro amistoso, entre Eliza y Max, una cita romántica y repleta de pasión. Joel impide que Sofía vea a su hija.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso: Robo frustrado
programme.desc: Uno de los escoltas de Aníbal se convierte en asesino y abre la caja fuerte. La masacre en el cementerio está a punto de desatarse. El último adiós a Adriana es masivo. Marcial está deprimido.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Michael es un transexual que reclama que le plagiaron sus fotos de igualdad, donde posa con una hetero. Vanessa tiene cáncer terminal, su cuñado le compra su espalda tatuada y ella se sana.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Dos vientres y una madre Tiburón sangriento
programme.desc: Mario demanda a Francisca, quien lleva en su vientre a dos bebés: uno de su ex y otro suyo. Leonel tiene una fundación para matar tiburones y demanda a su esposa, Giselle, porque lo sabotea.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Acciones que cuestan vidas Redes del terror
programme.desc: Vivian quiere que su esposo sea desalojado, porque le inyectó heroína a su hijo y murió de sobredosis. Antonio y Sandra denuncian al hotel donde se hospedaron, ya que la mafia los extorsionó.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Luisa se siente amenazada por su ex, Paula, quien le disparó y acuchilló su vestido de novia y se lo envió. Vanesa vendió a su hijastra a un empresario para alejarla de una relación lésbica.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Julián padece de itifalofobia, miedo a su erección y desea separarse de su esposa embarazada. Jesús denuncia a Bárbara como la peor madre del mundo, pide el divorcio y la custodia de su hijo.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: El abc del diablo Padre roba novia
programme.desc: Sandri demanda a los padres de niños que acosan a su hijo por sus diabólicas heridas. Manuel se casó con la novia de su hijo para hacerla ciudadana, pero se enamoraron y no se quieren separar.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Suegro estafado Ella me deshabilitó la vida
programme.desc: Enrique le envió dinero a su yerno y el muy pícaro lo dejó fuera del negocio que montó en Miami. Juan es veterano, Ana alega que sufre depresión y busca inhabilitarlo, pero él prefiere divorciarse.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Más perra que madre Desnuda en Time Square
programme.desc: Glenda fue abusada por su padrastro y quedó embarazada, su madre se quedó con el bebé para criarlo con él. Catalina va desnuda por todo Times Square tapada solo por la bandera americana.

programme.title: La máscara del amor
programme.desc: Un protagonista llega a buscar el amor entre cinco pretendientes enmascarados, quienes pueden participar por el amor o por el interés de un premio al final del show.

programme.title: El Lobo y la Tormenta
programme.desc: Después de ver un lobo en la distancia y huellas en la orilla, el equipo se dirige tierra adentro en busca de más pistas sobre el paradero del lobo.

programme.title: Vecinos Nuevos y Viejos
programme.desc: Casey y el equipo buscan la familia del cachorro perdido. Esperan que, al encontrarla, el cachorro también los haya encontrado.

programme.title: Nada como el Hogar
programme.desc: A medida que finaliza su expedición, la actividad del salmón y los osos disminuye, aunque todavía quedan algunos en la zona.

programme.title: Disposición de la Tierra
programme.desc: Casey y su equipo llegan a Nepal y se encuentran con Rajan Chadhary, un guía de tigres que los lleva por el Parque Nacional Bardiya

programme.title: En el Camino del Tigre
programme.desc: Casey y el equipo encuentran un tigre, pero las pistas llevan a callejones sin salida. Descubren vida silvestre y rastrean al tigre hasta el agua

programme.title: En el Dormitorio del Tigre
programme.desc: Casey y Rajan discuten tácticas: ¿esperar a los tigres o seguirlos en la jungla? Observan a los raros felinos cerca del lecho del río

programme.title: Ratas
programme.desc: Nueva York, una de las ciudades más infestadas de América, tiene cerca de 2 millones de roedores. Así combate la ciudad esta plaga

programme.title: El Pacífico Oculto
programme.desc: Una película pionera que destaca las islas de refugio nacional de vida silvestre y los monumentos marinos del Pacífico que sorprenderán al público

programme.title: Encuentros con pulpos
programme.desc: El pulpo es lo más parecido a un alienígena que hemos visto en la Tierra. Viajemos al Oceáno Pacífico para conocer más acerca de ellos.

programme.title: Las superbabosas marinas
programme.desc: Los invertebrados más coloridos del océano, los nudibraquios o babosas de mar, se adaptan increíblemente para sobrevivir en el océano.

programme.title: El renacimiento del bosque subacuático
programme.desc: Los bosques de algas marinas ayudan a albergar mayor variedad y diversidad de plantas y animales que casi cualquier otra comunidad marina.

programme.title: La ciencia de la ternura
programme.desc: La domesticación transformó a los lobos en perros. Nuevos hallazgos muestran que los perros levantan las cejas más que los lobos. ¿Por qué?

programme.title: Antártida: ciencia bajo cero
programme.desc: La Antártida es misteriosa e inexplorada. Científicos del Instituto Antártico Chileno estudian el cambio climático en condiciones extremas.

programme.title: El Amazonas incendiado
programme.desc: Más de 60,000 incendios azotaron el Amazonas en 2019. ¿Qué los causó? ¿Cómo afectarán la crisis climática? ¿Se recuperará el Amazonas?

programme.title: El rescate de un osezno
programme.desc: Casey Anderson se enfrentó con la decisión de dejar que un osezno pardo huérfano muera en la naturaleza o salvarlo.

programme.title: Escuela para ballenas
programme.desc: Sigue a una familia de cachalotes en el corazón del Océano Índico. Daremos a conocer al depredador dentado más grande de la Tierra.

programme.title: Chungungo: la nutria más pequeña del mundo
programme.desc: Los chuchungos, eligen vivir en la parte salvaje de Chile, a lo largo de toda la costa indómita del sur del Océano Pacífico.

programme.title: Explosión de vida
programme.desc: Desde flores salvajes hasta grandes colonias de medusas en Monterrey e increíbles olas que brillan en la oscuridad, esto es California.

programme.title: El Proyecto Romeo
programme.desc: Gabrielle Kleim, una de las muchas mujeres engañadas para compartir inteligencia por amor a instancias de Marcus Wolf y sus "Espías Romeo".

programme.title: El Espía Elegante: George Blake
programme.desc: George Blake, exagente del MI6 y espía soviético, causó estragos al revelar la operación secreta del Túnel de Berlín y otros secretos aliados

programme.title: China Roba el Futuro
programme.desc: Xialong Zhang y Cao Guangzhi fueron atrapados y procesados por el robo de programas de vehículos autónomos de Apple y Tesla

programme.title: La Partera Surfista
programme.desc: Riaan y Margreet van al aeropuerto de Plettenberg a lanzarse en paracaídas, cayendo a 200 km/h sobre ríos, bosques y el Atlántico.

programme.title: Senderismo en Tugela

programme.desc: Una joven se niega a dejar a su novio para mudarse de la ciudad con su familia, por lo que busca a su padre biológico para quedarse a vivir con él. La vida de la joven y de su padre cambiará y ambos aprenderán a conocerse.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La vida es dura pero madura
programme.desc: Felipe es utilizado y explotado por su madre y Azul, una bailarina que conoce en un club de strippers, con quien se obsesiona.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La zorra nunca se ve su cola
programme.desc: Brandon y Kevin no pierden oportunidad de aprovecharse y burlarse de Brayan o de hacerlo quedar en ridículo. Además, Brandon quiere todo con Britany y la fiesta es el momento ideal para quitársela a Brayan.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Le salió el tiro por la culata
programme.desc: Dos niños son aficionados de las películas de suspenso y tienen un blog para evidenciar a los vecinos que hacen cosas incorrectas. Los niños son testigos de un delito por el cual uno de sus padres es injustamente llevado a la cárcel.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Los dichos de los viejitos, son evangelios chiquitos
programme.desc: Desde que murió su madre, Lili fue criada por su abuela, y por no escuchar sus consejos, se aprovecharán de su inocencia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Últimamente, Sonia se ha enfermado con bastante regularidad. Además, la calidad del aire agravará su situación.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale pájaro en mano que cien volando
programme.desc: En su afán por progresar rápido, Gaby estará muy cerca de caer en las malvadas garras de un estafador.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La novedad es flor de un día, hoy ya no luce lo que ayer lucía
programme.desc: Los celos de José Luis lo están alejando de Marieta y si no hace algo por cambiar, podría perderla para siempre.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Después de diez semanas donde los momentos de diversión, alegría y emoción se hicieron presentes, los pequeños viven el último programa de la competencia con un gran performance al lado de grandes artistas como Paulina Rubio.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Biby Gaytán, María León, Albertano y Juanpa Zurita se unen a la nueva temporada y tendrán la tarea de seleccionar a los pequeños competidores. Los escuadrones quedan atrás y la competencia se vuelve individual.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los jueces se dan a la tarea de seleccionar a los últimos participantes. Los aspirantes se enfrentan en una serie de duelos donde tendrán que demostrar sus cualidades de canto y baile.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Ha Ash, Pandora y Omar Chaparro
programme.desc: Los invitados del grupo musical Ha Ash y Pandora además de un sketch cómico con Omar Chaparro. Se estrena la sección karaoke de las estrellas con Laura G y René Franco. En Telesa, la participación especial de Sebastián Rulli.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Sherlyn, Patricio Borghetti y Banda El Recodo
programme.desc: Bianca Marroquín presenta un fragmento de sus obras teatrales la Novicia Rebelde y Chicago junto a los pequeños. Sherlyn y Patricio Borghetti, se enfrentan en la prueba de karaoke de las estrellas. Finalmente un popurrí con la Banda el Recodo.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los jueces se dan a la tarea de seleccionar a los últimos participantes. Los aspirantes se enfrentan en una serie de duelos donde tendrán que demostrar sus cualidades de canto y baile.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños tendrán que dar su mejor esfuerzo y demostrar su talento en el escenario, ya que cuatro cantantes, junto con cuatro bailarinas, serán eliminados en el primer duelo de la competencia.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños tendrán que dar su mejor esfuerzo y demostrar su talento en el escenario, ya que cuatro cantantes, junto con cuatro bailarinas, serán eliminados en el primer duelo de la competencia.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Galilea Montijo presenta los escuadrones que participan en la competencia. Entre los jueces destacan: Bianca Marroquín, Raquel Ortega, Pierre Angelo, Noel Schajris, María José y Manuel Ibáñez. Además de contar con la presencia de Gloria Trevi.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Intimidación e insultos racistas, amenazas y ataques físicos. Letreros racistas pintados en las paredes, pareciera no haber lugar seguro. Una nueva realidad se está viviendo en muchos vecindarios, familias viviendo bajo el miedo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: De día es un estudiante universitario y de noche bailarín exótico. Para unos era su guía espiritual, para otros era un peligro para su comunidad.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En medio de las tensiones raciales de los últimos meses, Ilia Calderón se adentra en el mundo del Ku Klux Klan y entrevista a uno de sus líderes. Un encuentro lleno de amenazas e insultos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Hablan quienes conocieron desde niño a Juan Gabriel y quienes fueron testigos de su genio musical. Los rituales antes de enfrentar a su público y el testimonio de quienes permanecieron cerca de él.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En los campos de la Sierra de Guerrero, México, florecen la amapola y la violencia. Familias campesinas se ganan la vida con los cultivos ilegales. Los carteles de la droga buscan controlar el mercado.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Alrededor de 50 jóvenes de un mismo vecindario recibieron acusaciones de homicidios que los marcaron para siempre.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El drama de las misteriosas desapariciones de pilotos y los riesgos a los que se exponen en las selvas andinas.

programme.title: Manu Katché, Alfio Origlio, Walter Ricci & Jérôme Regard
programme.sub-title: Katché & Origlio Quartet feat. Walter Ricci
programme.desc: Four exceptional musicians team up to perform classic pop and soul songs made famous by the likes of Gregory Porter, Stevie Wonder, U2, Seal, and many more. Pianist Alfio Origlio signed up to do the arrangements. Walter Ricci, an accomplished jazz vocalist from Naples, eases us into his musical universe with his stunning sensitivity. He is accompanied by an exceptional rhythm section composed of Manu Katché on drums, Jérôme Regard on bass, and Alfio Origlio on piano. This concert was recorded at Festival Jazz au Sommet 2020 in France.

programme.title: Jaco Pastorius
programme.desc: The audience at the Montreal Jazz Festival in Canada was in for a treat on July 3, 1982, as a true musical innovator hit the stage: Jaco Pastorius, who transformed the electric bass into a formidable solo instrument. Combining intricate harmonics, fluid melodies, and unparalleled technical skill, Pastorius left a lasting impact on the music world. In this concert, he is accompanied by Peter Erskine (drums), Don Alias (percussion), Othello Molineaux (steel drums), Bob Mintzer (tenor sax and bass clarinet), and Randy Brecker (trumpet and electronics). They perform “Chicken”, “Donna Lee”, “Mr. Phone Bone”, and “Fannie Mae”. Don't miss this extraordinary opportunity to experience Jaco Pastorius's electrifying performance at the Montreal Jazz Festival 1982!

programme.title: James Brown
programme.sub-title: James Brown - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1981, legendary American singer James Brown gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. The "Godfather of Soul", "Mr. Dynamite", and "Soul Brother No. 1" was a major force in 20th century popular music, influencing many musicians in numerous genres.

programme.title: Gary Burton & Makoto Ozone
programme.desc: 'Münchner Klaviersommer' was an annual concerts series that took place from 1981 to 1998 in Munich, Germany. Although the festival's name suggests a strong focus on piano music, it featured countless famous musicians from jazz and classical music – not just pianists. The concerts were usually held in July at The Gasteig, home of the Munich Philharmonic. In 1995, vibraphonist Gary Burton and pianist Makoto Ozone, both great jazz players noted for their virtuoso technique and innovative style, came together to give a concert of improvised music. They delighted the audience with their fluid, poetic artistry, which was expressed in a performance of the highest order.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential jazz guitarists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Revel in Wes Montgomery's virtuosity as he performs the captivating “Nica's Dream” in Holland in 1965, and delight in the expressive beauty of his rendition of “Here's That Rainy Day”, recorded in London in that same year. Experience the timeless appeal of Joe Pass's “You Stepped Out of a Dream” and “You Turned The Tables on Me”, recorded live in Hanover in 1975. The interplay between Jim Hall and Atilla Zoller borders on the impossible as they perform “Extensions” in Hanover in 1973. Enjoy Jim Hall's lyrical solo performance of “I'm Getting Sentimental Over You” from 1964. Witness Sonny Sharrock's avant-garde fusion of jazz and rock in an exhilarating performance of “Peanut", recorded live in France in 1970. Sharrock is joined by flutist Herbie Mann in a soulful performance of “Memphis Underground” from 1969. Immerse yourself in the magic of jazz guitar!

programme.title: Carla Bley, Steve Swallow, Wayne Krantz & Victor Lewis
programme.sub-title: Carla Bley Sextet live at Estival Lugano 1986
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. Discover the special bond between pianist Carla Bley and bassist Steve Swallow. The two have performed in the same bands since the '60s and have been romantic partners for more than two decades. Watching them perform is the definition of musical telepathy. Together with musicians Wayne Krantz, Victor Lewis, Larry Willis, and Don Alias, they form an amazing sextet at Estival in 1986.

programme.title: Steve Gadd
programme.desc: Many of pianist Chick Corea's compositions have become jazz standards. As a member of Miles Davis' band in the late 1960s, he participated in the birth of the electric jazz fusion movement. In the 1970s, Corea founded the legendary jazz fusion group Return to Forever. Along with Herbie Hancock, McCoy Tyner and Keith Jarrett, Corea is one of the biggest modern jazz pianists. He continued musical collaborations with a diverse range of artists, exploring various musical styles. This broadcast features three performances that illustrate Chick Corea's many talents.

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances present Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73. Whereas it took the composer over a decade to complete his first symphony, he penned his Symphony No. 2 in just a few months, during his summer sojourn in the restful Austrian village of Pörtschach in 1877. Nicknamed his ‘Pastoral' symphony, the work is arguably the most sunny and optimistic of Brahms's four symphonies. Lyrical in character, it features joyful melodies. This performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Claudio Abbado & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.desc: The Lucerne Festival Orchestra performs Gustav Mahler's Symphony No. 5 under the direction of Claudio Abbado. This unique orchestra was formed as part of the annual festival in Lucerne, Switzerland.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Schubert - Symphony No. 8 in B minor, D. 759
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance Les Dissonances perform Franz Schubert's Symphony No. 8 in B minor, D. 759, also known as the ‘Unfinished Symphony'. Schubert started composing the work in 1822, but only completed the first two movements. The first movement, Allegro moderato, has a dark, mysterious mood, which contrasts with the beautiful second movement in E major, Andante con moto. Schubert only penned a couple of measures of the third movement, a Scherzo, in full score. It is not known why the composer never finished his symphony. Although it is not complete, it has become one of Schubert's most popular compositions. This performance was recorded at Cité de la musique in Paris, France, in 2013.

programme.title: Baiba Skride
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Evgeny Kissin, Iddo Bar-Shai & Arielle Beck
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration - I
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored chamber music repertoire in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Evgeny Kissin, Iddo Bar-Shaï, and Arielle Beck violinists Gidon Kremer, Maxim Vengerov, and Tedi Papavrami cellist Mischa Maisky, Flugelhorn player Sergei Nakariakov, as well as her daughter and grandson: Lyda Chen-Argerich (piano and viola) and David Chen-Argerich (piano). On the program are Alfred Schnittke's Congratulatory rondo for piano and violin Preludes No. 5, 21, and 24 from Mieczysław Weinberg's 24 Preludes, Op. 100 (arranged for solo violin by G. Kremer) ‘Waltz' and ‘Slava' from Sergei Rachmaninoff's 6 Morceaux, Op. 11, and Romance for six hands Fritz Kreisler's Liebesleid Robert Schumann's Fantasiestücke Op. 73, and Piano Quintet in E-flat major, Op. 44 and ‘Laideronnette, impératrice des Pagodes' from Maurice Ravel's Ma mère l'Oye. This performance was recorded on June 11, 2021.

programme.title: Huelgas Ensemble & Paul Van Nevel
programme.desc: Conductor Paul Van Nevel and his Huelgas Ensemble present the ideal Christmas program, consisting of an atmospheric musical selection of 14th to 19th-century compositions. The Huelgas Ensemble, which has emerged as one of Europe's premiere vocal ensembles dedicated to the performance of music from the Middle Ages and the Renaissance, is the ideal candidate for the job, conveying all the mystery and luster a Christmas celebration calls for. Van Nevel organized his varied musical selection in four distinct themes: ‘The Birth in Bethlehem', ‘The Crime of Herodes', ‘The Travel of the Three Kings', and an Epilogue. In 2015, the full program was performed and recorded at the baroque St. Augustine Church currently known as AMUZ in Antwerp, Belgium. ‘The Birth in Bethlehem' opens and closes with pieces by unidentified composers, 'Balaam de quo Vaticinans' and 'A Carol for Christmas Eve' respectively. The core of this section is made up of Jacobus Gallus's 'Myrabile Mysterium' and Jerónimo Luca's 'Este nino que es sol del Aurora'. ‘The Crime of Herodes' opens with 'Hostis Herodes Impie' by an unidentified composer, followed by Jean Mouton's 'Interrogabat Magos Herodes', Giaches De Wert's 'Vox in Rama', and Bertram Luard-Selby's 'A Voice from Ramah was There Sent'. ‘The Travel of the Three Kings Melchior, Caspar and Balthazar' opens with 'Vincti Presepio' (anonymous), followed by Pierre De Manchicourt's 'Reges Terrae', Jan Pieterszoon Sweelinck's 'Ab Oriente', and Peter Cornelius 'Drei Könige Wandern'. Lastly, the Epilogue consists of 'Quae Stella Sole Pulchrior' (anonymous) and António Marques Lésbio's 'Dexen que Ilore mi Niño'.

programme.title: Bee Gees
programme.desc: Journalists and critics examine the rise and success of The Bee Gees. The Bee Gees received their first record deal in 1963 with Festival Records. March 1978 saw the Bee Gees occupy the two top positions on the US charts with Night Fever and Staying Alive. Having won five Grammy awards for Saturday Night Fever, the Bee Gees were a worldwide sensation, for the first time since The Beatles.
